summary: Join us for Boulder Bash 9, our annual Fall bouldering competition, from November 9th to 14th at Bridges Rock Gym. The competition kicks off with a Redpoint Round, and the top 10 competitors will advance to the Onsight Finals on November 14th. Registration is $25 for members and $50 for non-members, with free entry for spectators.
The USAC Youth + Collegiate Qualifier Event will take place on Saturday, November 8th at Bridges Rock Gym. Please note that the gym will be closed all day for this event.
The California Climbing Team Onsight Series is scheduled for Sunday, November 9th from 7am to 11am at Bridges Rock Gym. The gym will be closed during this time.
The NorCal Youth Climbing League event will take place on Saturday, November 22nd at Bridges Rock Gym. The gym will be closed all day for this competition.
